title: What's new in Cloud SQL: Drive performance, high availability, and security
summary: Google Cloud announced new AI-driven capabilities for Cloud SQL supporting MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, including automated health management, fleet-wide insights, and enhanced performance, availability, and security. Database Migration Service facilitates low-risk cloud migrations for optimized database strategy.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video covers new AI-driven capabilities for Cloud SQL across MySQL, PostgreSQL, and SQL Server, including automated health management, fleet-wide insights, and improvements to performance, availability, and security. It also addresses Database Migration Service for lower-risk cloud migrations. The takeaways: managed databases gain automated health and fleet-level monitoring, and migration tooling supports moving existing workloads to Cloud SQL.
